description: Resilience test — proves the pipeline handles a P4 proxy source returning HTTP 403 gracefully. No crash, no partial fact_lineage rows created. Also covers network-level errors (fetch throws).
decision: DECISIONS.md 2026-04-28 — Facts-extraction firewall is non-negotiable; pipeline must not crash on bad upstream responses
what_this_test_proves: fetchViaRss2Json catches non-2xx proxy response and returns [] — pipeline never crashes
fetchViaRss2Json catches network-level errors (fetch throws) and returns [] — same guarantee
fetchRSSArticles bySource stats show 0 for the failed feed — not undefined
When no articles are returned, extractFacts is architecturally unreachable — no partial fact_lineage rows can be created
Proxy-fetched Fotomaç articles carry is_p4: true — correctly flagged even via proxy path
